lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Well hello there. Are you hungry? If so you've come to the right place. Eat green, eat gnome cuisine. My waiter will be glad to take your order.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: On the other hand, if you're looking for some gnome cooking training, this is also the place to be. My son Lufty is looking for staff at the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank, I'm no cook.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: In that case, please eat and enjoy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll give it a go.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Well that's great. I'm Aluft Gianne, owner of this restaurant, and you are...?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Most people call me [player name].

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Really? Sorry, how rude of me. It just takes a little while to get used to the funny names you humans have.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Of course if you're going to work for me I'll have to see what you're like first. Here, take a look at our menu.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: When you've had a look at the book, come back here and I'll let you prepare a few dishes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Mr. Gianne.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Hello [player name]. So what did you think of the book?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not too sure about toad's legs.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: They're a gnome delicacy, very tasty. Chicken tastes like toad's legs you know. You'll love them. If I give you what you need, can you make me some Toad Crunchies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll give it a go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: The dough is made according to a secret family recipe. If you need any more, I suggest you speak to Hudo the grocer. He's very reliable.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Let me know how you get on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Mr Gianne.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: So how did you get on with the toad crunchies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've got one.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: That looks identical to the crunchies I cooked not five minutes ago. You'll have to prove to me that you can make one yourself if you want my recommendation.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, I've not quite finished it yet.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Ok, let me know when you have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I've lost the crunchie tray you gave to me.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Ok, I'll give you another one. Obviously I can't expect you to cook without the proper utensils.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've not finished yet.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Ok, well let me know when you're done.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Call me Aluft. So how did you get on with the toad crunchies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem, it was easy.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Not bad, not bad at all.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Ok, now for something you might prefer. Try making some chocolate chip crunchies for me. They're my favourite. Here's everything you need. You can re-use the spice from the last recipe - one tin goes a long way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok Aluft, I'll be back soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Aluft.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Hello there, how did you get on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't made it yet.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: It's one trayful of chocolate chip crunchies that I need. Just follow the instructions carefully.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Yes, yes, yes, that's superb. I'm really impressed.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Ok then, can you make me a toad batta? Here's what you need.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Let me know when the batta is ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Mr Gianne.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Aluft.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, Aluft.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: So where's my toad batta?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've got one.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: That looks identical to the toad batta I cooked not five minutes ago. You'll have to prove to me that you can make one yourself if you want my recommendation.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I've lost the batta tin you gave to me.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Ok, I'll give you another one. Obviously I can't expect you to cook without the proper utensils.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've not finished yet.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Ok, be as quick as you can.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you go, that was no problem.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Ooh, that's some good toad. Very nice.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Let's see if you can make a cheese and tomato batta next.

sections.title: Cheese and tomato batta task dialogue

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Aluft.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Hello [player name] have you made my Cheese and tomato Batta?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've got one.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: That looks identical to the cheese and tomato batta I cooked not five minutes ago. You'll have to prove to me that you can make one yourself if you want my recommendation.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here, see what you think.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Hmm, that's actually really good.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: How about this? Hmmm. I think you may well be ready for real cooking. Well I'm happy to give you my recommendation to Jnr, if that's what you want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great thanks.

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Well your training with me is over [player name]. Are you interested in some work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I may be...

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: I think you're almost ready to do some work for my son Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of our new family venture: Gnome Food Delivery. There's good tips to be made if you make and deliver gnome foods -

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: though you may have to travel all over Gielinor to fulfil some of the other orders...

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: However, some of the orders Aluft aloft gets are for gnome cocktails, so if you want to work for Lufty, you'll need to undergo some basic cocktail making training. Go and have a chat with him. He's not that

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: scary...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Oh, one last thing. My special dough, can be occasionally tricky to get hold of. I wouldn't want to stop you from cooking gnome delicacies for want of dough!

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: That should last you for a small while eh? That's all the free dough I'm going to give you so don't waste it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Well your training with me is over [player name]. Are you interested in some work?

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Blurberry tells me that you have finished training with him, so I think you're ready to do some work for my son Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of our new family venture: Gnome Food Delivery. There's good

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: tips to be made if you make and deliver gnome foods - though you may have to travel all over Gielinor to fulfil some of the other orders...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds interesting....

lines.speaker: Aluft Gianne snr.
lines.text: Go and have a chat with my son Lufty Jnr. and he'll fill you in with details.
